name: polish
description: Personal collection of curated, self-made, and adapted agent skills for prompt rewriting, frontend design quality, repository workflows, and release safety.

interface.shortDescription: Curated personal skills for agent workflows
interface.longDescription: Polish is a personal collection of curated, self-made, and adapted agent skills. It includes prompt rewriting, duplicate-file planning, pre-push risk review, portable frontend taste, design-system extraction, brief enhancement, shadcn/ui implementation guidance, and prefixed Superpowers workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use prompt-polish to rewrite this prompt: ...
Rewrite this question for a better LLM answer.
Run before-git-push on my staged changes: PUSH or HOLD?
Use superpowers-using-git-worktrees before starting this feature.
Use superpowers-brainstorming to design this change before implementation.
Use superpowers-systematic-debugging to investigate this failure.
Use superpowers-verification-before-completion before claiming this work is done.
Use google-stitch-frontend-taste-design to establish the visual direction for this interface.
Use google-stitch-extract-frontend-design-system to document this repository's visual language.
Use google-stitch-frontend-brief-enhancer to turn this UI request into an implementation brief.
Use google-stitch-shadcn-ui to implement or review this shadcn/ui interface.
